Table	Create Table
attack_playbooks	CREATE TABLE `attack_playbooks` (
  `id` varchar(36) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL,
  `engagement_id` int(11) DEFAULT NULL,
  `name` varchar(512) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL,
  `description` text COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `target_environment` varchar(128) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `target_platform` varchar(64) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `kill_chain_coverage` json DEFAULT NULL,
  `pre_exploit_steps` json DEFAULT NULL,
  `exploit_steps` json DEFAULT NULL,
  `post_exploit_steps` json DEFAULT NULL,
  `cleanup_steps` json DEFAULT NULL,
  `caldera_abilities` json DEFAULT NULL,
  `msf_modules` json DEFAULT NULL,
  `atomic_tests` json DEFAULT NULL,
  `estimated_duration` varchar(64) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `risk_level` enum('low','medium','high','critical') COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT 'medium',
  `roe_compliant` tinyint(1) DEFAULT '1',
  `status` enum('draft','approved','executing','completed','aborted') COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT 'draft',
  `created_by` varchar(64) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `created_at` bigint(20) NOT NULL,
  `updated_at` bigint(20) NOT NULL,
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`) /*T![clustered_index] CLUSTERED */
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci
